scripts.build: npm run build -w @nexops/shared && npm run build -w @nexops/api && npm run build -w @nexops/web
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @nexops/api" "npm run dev -w @nexops/web"
scripts.test: npm run build -w @nexops/shared && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test:coverage: npm run build -w @nexops/shared && npm run test:coverage --workspaces --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @nexops/shared && npm run typecheck -w @nexops/api && npm run typecheck -w @nexops/web
scripts.validate: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
